pages.text: Nine $(l)Aether Shards$() pressed into a 3×3 lattice form one $(l)Block of Aether$(). $(br2)The compressed block radiates a faint glow (light 9) and behaves as a $(l)beacon base$() block — alongside Magic Crystal Block and its concentrated form.
$(l)Reverse:$() One block decomposes back into 9 shards (shapeless). Useful for inventory normalization.
